entry.title: New: Bill 2971 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2025-09-03
entry.content:
A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING ORDINANCE NO. B-2025-906, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO THE CAPITAL BUDGET OF THE COUNTY OF KAUA‘I, STATE OF HAWAI‘I, FOR THE FISCAL YEAR JULY 1, 2025 THROUGH JUNE 30, 2026, BY REVISING THE AMOUNTS ESTIMATED IN THE PUBLIC ACCESS, OPEN SPACE, NATURAL RESOURCES PRESERVATION FUND – CIP (Hanapepe Parcel Monument Improvement – $215,000.00)

Latest action: On agenda 2025-09-03

View on the council site
